creator: kmoore@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 144943
Fix the Makefile and bump PORTREV

I was debugging why audio/pithos couldn't import pylast module, and found that the audio/py-pylast port needed INSTALLS_EGGINFO= yes set for import to work. Built with this flag, pithos works as expected now. 

Patch is attached which adds this flag and bumps PORTREV.
